args.query: SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE artist LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%' AND title LIKE '%Street Hype%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE artist LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%' AND title LIKE '%Street Hype%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE (artist LIKE '%Brucqe%' OR artist LIKE '%Maginnis%') AND title LIKE '%Street%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE (artist LIKE '%Brucqe%' OR artist LIKE '%Maginnis%') AND title LIKE '%Street%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
